title: jatropha calyculata
intro: Jatropha calyculata, also known as the calyculata jatropha, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family (Euphorbiaceae) that is native to Central and South America. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties that can help to reduce pain, swelling, and infection. The health benefits of Jatropha calyculata include its ability to treat a range of conditions, including fever, rheumatism, and skin problems, as well as its potential to lower cholesterol levels and improve digestion. Jatropha calyculata is often prepared as a herbal tea or tincture, and can also be used topically in the form of a poultice or ointment to treat skin conditions and wounds.
